{{CargoRelic
|name=Cybervenatrix Core
|class_id=21424
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=Mechanized god-core. Bestows life to machines, purges corruption, and whispers to Catbot leaders.
|fame=68
|art=54
|fth=71
|civ=61
|tech=108
|ss1=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +6<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +6<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss2=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +8<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +8<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +8<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss3=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +10<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +10<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +10<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss4=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +14<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +14<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +14<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss5=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +18<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +18<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +18<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss6=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +24<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +24<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100
|ss7=Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +24<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail ATK +24<br>Per 2 TECH Master Scrolls used, Snail RUSH +24<br>TECH Master Scrolls Used:100/100<br>Per Orange+ Gear equipped, Snail DEF +20 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: Medal Output +30
|skill2=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill3=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50px]]Place in Murikan Museum: In Murika, DMG +30%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Inorganic life|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Grandmaster Scroll, +40|orange}}
|3name=Catbot|3rec=74.31M|3atk=222229|3defense=148441|3hp=12519447|3weak=32982
|4name=Dogbot|4rec=96.07M|4atk=268444|4defense=179058|4hp=17570611|4weak=37769
|5name=Felis Rex|5rec=121.91M|5atk=322922|5defense=215416|5hp=24087548|5weak=43672
|6name=Canis Rex|6rec=151.25M|6atk=384654|6defense=256693|6hp=32377356|6weak=49393
|Arec=184.16M|Aatk=454097|Adefense=302999|Ahp=42745695|Aweak=55201
}}}}
